title: Adi Shakti Adyapeeth
desc: Annadacharan Bhattacharya had a divine vision and found an idol in Kolkata. This miracle made him famous and people called him Annada Thakur from then on.

title: Khonar Kahini
desc: Khona's tale blends mythology and history, following the legendary astrologer-poet who challenged societal norms with wisdom and wit in medieval Bengal's patriarchal culture.

title: Moner Manush
